data.title: Secure Sockets Layer
data.description: SSL encrypts data exchanged between the website and users.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: WAFs protect against common web threats such as SQL injection and XSS.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain uptime.
data.technical_spec: Employs network layer filtering and real-time traffic analysis.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine audits are conducted to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Both automated vulnerability scanners and manual penetration testing are used.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances security by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Supports biometric, token-based, and SMS-based verification.
